title: Dear valued client,
text-1: This message is to inform you that on December 30th, 2017 at 22:00 GMT all open CFD positions will be closed in accordance with the
text-2: The orders will be processed according to the asset’s market price at the time of the closing.
text-3:
We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and urge you to plan your trading activities accordingly.
Should you have any additional questions, please don’t hesitate to contact our Support Team.
